title: Proclamation No. 852, s. 2014
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 852

DECLARING WEDNESDAY, 17 SEPTEMBER 2014, AS A SPECIAL (NON-WORKING) DAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LOS BAÑOS, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA

WHEREAS, Wednesday, 17 September 2014, marks the 399 th Foundation Day anniversary of the Municipality of Los Baños, Laguna;

WHEREAS, in order to give the people of the Municipality of Los Baños, Laguna the opportunity to celebrate and participate in the occasion, it is but fitting and proper to declare 17 September 2014, as a special non-working day.

NOW, THEREFORE, I, PAQUITO N. OCHOA JR., Executive Secretary, by authority of His Excellency, BENIGNO S. AQUINO III, do hereby declare Wednesday, 17 September 2014, as a special (non-working) day in the Municipality of Los Baños, Laguna.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 18th day of August, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Fourteen.

By the authority of the President:

(Sgd.) PAQUITO N. OCHOA JR. Executive Secretary
